content.problemStatement:
You have run into an army of NNN monsters, and you must defeat them all!

Each monster has a certain amount of health points (HP) which you know beforehand — the iii-th monster has HiH_{i}Hi​ HP.

You can attack exactly **one** monster per day, and only if your attack stat AAA is **greater than or equal to** the monster's HP. In other words, you can attack a monster only if you can defeat it in a single hit.

At the end of each day, the HP of each alive monster increases by a fixed value, XXX.

Find the minimum possible value of the attack stat AAA you need to be able to kill all the monsters.

Note that you're allowed to kill the monsters in any order you like.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and XXX — the number of monsters and the amount by which HP increases per day, respectively.
The next line contains NNN space separated integers, H1,H2,…,HNH_{1}, H_{2}, \ldots, H_{N}H1​,H2​,…,HN​, the initial HP stats of the NNN monsters.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line a single integer, the minimum attack stat AAA needed to be able to kill all monsters.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2×1052 \times 10^{5}2×105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: We can kill all monsters with an attack stat of 212121 as follows:

On the first day, we kill the monster with 222 HP. The HP stats of the remaining monsters increase by X=10X = 10X=10 each, and will become [13,11][13, 11][13,11].
On the second day, we kill the monster with 131313 HP. The HP stat of the remaining monster will increase by 101010 again, and will be 212121.
On the third day, we kill the remaining monster with 212121 HP.

It can be proven that we cannot kill all the monsters with an attack stat of less than 212121, so this is optimal.
For example, with an attack stat of 202020, we'll be able to kill any two monsters but on the third day, the remaining monster will have more than 202020 HP and we'll be unable to kill it.
Test case 222: Kill the first monster (with a HP of 101010). The other monsters can be killed in any order afterwards.
